title: C3 CLI
excerpt: description: Use C3 (`create-cloudflare` CLI) to set up and deploy new applications using framework-specific setup guides to ensure each new application follows Cloudflare and any third-party best practices for deployment. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Cloudflare provides a CLI command for creating new Workers and Pages projects — `npm create cloudflare`, powered by the [create-cloudflare package ↗](https://www.npmjs.com/package/create-cloudflare). npm create cloudflare@latest -- --platform=pages
